message.content:
Thoroughly explore the codebase at /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol. I need to understand:

1. Read ALL component files (tsx and scss) in src/components/ and its subdirectories
2. Read src/App.tsx, src/main.tsx
3. Read src/styles/_tokens.scss and src/styles/global.scss
4. Read src/types.ts if it exists
5. Read src/data/ directory if it exists
6. Read tsconfig.json, vite.config.ts, package.json
7. Read any existing test files

Give me the FULL contents of every file you find. This is critical - I need to see every line of code in the project.

content.text: I'll thoroughly explore the codebase and read all the files you've specified. Let me start by systematically searching and reading everything.

    15→};
